/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/argus.dir/cmd/argus/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/mux/remux_muxer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/runtime/runtime_http.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/runtime/runtime_manifest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/runtime/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/runtime/sink_handle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/servers/rtmp/rtmp_amf0.c.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/servers/rtmp/rtmp_chunk.c.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/servers/rtmp/rtmp_handshake.c.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/servers/rtmp/rtmp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/servers/rtmp/rtmp_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/servers/webrtc/webrtc_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/sinks/hls_sink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/sinks/remux_sink_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/sources/buffered_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/sources/packet_typing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus.dir/core/sources/subscription_packet_reader.cpp.o -o argus  libdatachannel/libdatachannel-static.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libavformat.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libavcodec.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libswscale.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libavutil.dylib libdatachannel/deps/usrsctp/usrsctplib/libusrsctp.a libdatachannel/deps/libsrtp/libsrtp2.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib libdatachannel/deps/libjuice/libjuice-static.a
